data.title: Jolt Health Adds Green-Energy Veteran Chris Farnworth to Board
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Love Pharma Inc ( (TSE:JOLT) ) has issued an update.

Jolt Health Inc. has appointed Chris Farnworth as an independent director to its board, bringing in a seasoned business development and corporate finance executive with deep experience in the global mining, green energy and circular-economy sectors, including prior roles at a Top 50 TSX Venture company and Noram Lithium, as well as his current position as CEO of UK-based Zero Carbon Technologies. Farnworth’s appointment, alongside the resignation of director Douglas Taylor, is expected to strengthen Jolt’s strategic capabilities and global network as the company advances its life sciences and AI-driven healthcare ambitions, potentially enhancing its access to capital, sustainability-focused partnerships and new international growth opportunities.

More about Love Pharma Inc

Jolt Health Inc. is a life sciences company focused on healthcare, biotechnology and artificial intelligence, holding exclusive licenses for innovative therapeutic and pharmaceutical products across Europe, the UK and North America. The company aims to help shape the future of healthcare through research, collaboration and technological advancement, positioning itself at the intersection of cutting-edge medical innovation and AI-driven solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 8,845

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1.15M

The latest announcement is out from Crawford & Company A ( ($CRD.A) ).

On January 14, 2026, Crawford & Company entered into a new executive employment agreement with Michael J. Hoberman in connection with his promotion to CEO – US Operations, effective January 1, 2026. The agreement outlines a compensation package including a $475,000 annual base salary beginning in 2026, a target annual bonus equal to 57.5% of base salary under the Short Term Incentive Plan, long-term incentive awards targeted at $550,000 for 2026, and a sales incentive payment equal to 0.5% of quarterly billed U.S. service fees for the first 24 months of each sale, signaling a strong performance- and growth-oriented focus for the company’s U.S. leadership structure.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

Prudential Financial ( (PRU) ) has provided an announcement.

For the quarter ended December 31, 2025, Prudential Financial reported preliminary figures showing PGIM segment assets under management of $1.47 trillion and approximately $55 million in other related revenues, net of related expenses, on an adjusted operating income basis, reflecting income from incentive and transaction fees, seed and co-investments, and mortgage originations. Over the same period, alternative investment income in the company’s General Account portfolio was estimated to be $5 million to $25 million below near-term expectations, and management emphasized that these unaudited figures are based on preliminary data and may differ materially once financial closing procedures are completed and full quarterly results are released in early February 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (PRU) stock is a Hold with a $126.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prudential Financial stock, see the PRU Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Horizon Space Updates Proxy Materials for SL BIO Merger
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. ( (HSPT) ) has provided an update.

On January 13, 2026, Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. filed a definitive proxy statement for an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders scheduled for February 3, 2026, to vote on its proposed business combination with SL BIO Ltd., and has now issued updated proxy materials correcting and replacing certain references to its trust and transfer agents. The company clarified that Wilmington Trust, National Association, is the trustee of its IPO trust account and updated contact details for its proxy solicitor and transfer agent, while also restating detailed redemption procedures and deadlines for public shareholders, including a January 30, 2026 redemption election cutoff, and warning that significant redemptions could reduce post-merger liquidity and potentially jeopardize the combined company’s ability to meet Nasdaq listing standards, although no changes were made to the meeting’s time, place, record date, or proposals.

More about Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp.

Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. (HSPT) is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to effect a business combination, or merger, with one or more operating businesses, and is currently pursuing a proposed transaction with SL BIO Ltd., a Cayman Islands exempted company, as part of its strategy to bring a target company to the public markets.

Average Trading Volume: 8,728

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $95.7M

data.title: Endeavour Silver Files Indenture for US$350 Million 0.25% Convertible Notes Due 2031
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Endeavour Silver ( (TSE:EDR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 15, 2026, Endeavour Silver Corp. filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission reporting that it had executed an indenture dated December 4, 2025, with Computershare Trust Company, N.A. as trustee, governing a US$350 million issuance of 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The filing formalizes the terms under which the notes were created, including conversion, redemption, default and other covenant provisions, underscoring Endeavour Silver’s continued use of U.S. debt capital markets and adding a sizable, low-coupon convertible financing instrument to its capital structure, with potential implications for future leverage and shareholder dilution if the notes are converted into equity.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EDR) stock is a Hold with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Endeavour Silver stock, see the TSE:EDR Stock Forecast page.

The company’s strategic initiatives and production growth are promising, but profitability and cash flow issues remain significant concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:EDR stock, click here.

data.title: Oriental Rise Regains Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Compliance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd. ( (ORIS) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 15, 2026, Oriental Rise Holdings Limited announced it had regained compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement after its ordinary shares closed at or above US$1.00 for ten consecutive trading days from December 30, 2025 through January 14, 2026, resolving a deficiency first flagged by Nasdaq on June 30, 2025. The restored compliance secures the company’s continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market and is positioned by management as a reinforcement of its corporate governance standards, removing an overhang that had posed potential delisting risk for shareholders and stabilizing its standing in U.S. capital markets.

More about Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd.

Oriental Rise Holdings Limited is an integrated tea supplier in mainland China, producing primarily processed and refined white and black tea. The company operates vertically integrated operations from tea cultivation through processing to sales, serving both tea business operators such as wholesale distributors and end-user retail customers, with tea gardens located in Zherong County, Ningde City, Fujian Province.

Average Trading Volume: 541,030

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.72M

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. ( (TSE:GDN) ) has shared an announcement.

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. has announced a non-brokered private placement of up to 5,000,000 units at $0.05 per unit, for gross proceeds of up to $250,000, with each unit comprising one common share and a transferable warrant exercisable at $0.065 for two years. The financing, which has received conditional approval from the Canadian Securities Exchange, will provide additional working capital for administration, exploration and evaluation expenditures, and other short-term investments, reinforcing the company’s funding base for ongoing operations while subjecting the new shares to a four-month hold period under applicable securities laws.

More about Golden Age Exploration Ltd.

Golden Age Exploration Ltd., listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the symbol GDN, operates in the mineral exploration sector, focusing on early-stage exploration and evaluation activities. The company’s work centers on advancing its exploration projects and managing associated administration and working capital needs typical of junior resource issuers.

data.title: Lakeland Financial Promotes Robinson-Gay to Chief Credit Officer
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Lakeland Financial ( (LKFN) ) is now available.

On January 15, 2026, Lakeland Financial Corporation announced that Donald J. Robinson-Gay was promoted to Executive Vice President and Chief Credit Officer of both the company and its subsidiary, Lake City Bank, effective January 14, 2026. Robinson-Gay, who has led Lake City Bank’s credit division since 2023 and previously held a series of senior credit and commercial banking roles within the bank and at institutions including M&I Bank and BMO Harris Bank, will oversee management of the loan portfolio, credit quality and policies, and play a key role on key risk and loan committees; his appointment, supported by a Change in Control Agreement, underscores the bank’s emphasis on disciplined credit oversight and sustainable loan growth as it balances risk management with continued expansion in its Indiana markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (LKFN) stock is a Hold with a $62.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lakeland Financial stock, see the LKFN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LKFN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LKFN is a Outperform.

Score is driven mainly by strong financial performance (solid growth, profitability, and a conservative balance sheet with steady ROE). Valuation is supportive with a moderate P/E and attractive dividend yield, while the main drag is technical weakness (below major moving averages with negative MACD and subdued momentum).

To see Spark’s full report on LKFN stock, click here.

More about Lakeland Financial

Lake City Bank, the single bank subsidiary of Lakeland Financial Corporation, is a $6.9 billion community bank headquartered in Warsaw, Indiana, founded in 1872. It serves Central and Northern Indiana through 55 branches and a digital banking platform, focusing on long-term in-market relationships and technology-forward solutions for retail and commercial clients.
